nodes.title: CLIP Text Encode (Positive Prompt)
widgets_values: This is the positive text prompt

nodes.title: CLIP Text Encode (Positive Prompt)
widgets_values:
Beat 1 (0-2 seconds): A 22yr old dark haired teenage girl is looking out over a grimey, futuristic, cyber punk city scape from the top of a massive sky scraper.

Beat 2 (2-4.5 seconds): The camera pans to a grungey part of the city, where merchants, customers, cyber junkies and the poor go about thier day. 

Beat 3 (4.5-7 seconds): a blast of lightning streaks the sky and it starts to rain, the camera follows a mysterious lady holding a black umbrella that covers her face from view, the ladies feet splash in the puddles of water forming on the ground.

Beat 4 (7-9 seconds): The camera follow the lady as she continues to walk, The lady walks through smoke from a previous explosion, she walks to the lifeless forms on the street, She seems concerned and disoriented, trash and debris litters the street, realistic real atmposhere.

Beat 4 (9-12 seconds): The camera pulls back to skyscraper, The water running down the road turns red, We see all the forms laying on the ground, a black umbrella rolls around slowly and streaks of the red water run slowly across it, the scene morphs into a photographic digital image disconnecting the viewer from the scene, atmposhere of something real becoming too much to handle and implies disassociation by preferring to think it is just an image so it is easier to deal with. low 2 positive prompt
